rag_rules: Place input assumptions in component type annexes
Use assign only for implementation-level bindings
Avoid subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Use concrete bounds or visible relations for range assumptions
generic_rules: Use AGREE annex blocks for component type and implementation contracts
Place assumptions in type annexes and bindings in implementation annexes
Use visible feature names in contracts when available
Avoid AADL property names as AGREE variables
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume` for assumptions and `guarantee` for guarantees
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables
Do not use range comparisons or 0/1 equality over Boolean, enumeration-like, or opaque data ports
